raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because Citi failed to conduct a reasonable investigation of my billing dispute involving a transaction with XXXX in the amount of {$11000.00}. 
I submitted substantial evidence supporting my position, including : Return Merchandise Authorization ( RMA ) issued by the merchant. 
Proof of Delivery confirming the return package was delivered to the merchant 's designated return facility. 
Additional documentation regarding the return. 
Despite repeatedly providing this evidence, Citi 's responses do not address it. 
Instead, Citi merely states that it reviewed information from the merchant and concluded that the charge is valid. 
Citi has never explained : Why my Proof of Delivery was rejected.

Why my RMA documentation was rejected. 
What evidence from the merchant outweighed my evidence. 
Whether Citi independently verified the merchant 's claims. 
Whether the merchant provided photographs, serial-number verification, package inspection records, weight records, or any other objective evidence. 
The merchant 's position appears to be based solely on its assertion that the returned item was incorrect. However, Citi has never provided any explanation of how it determined that the merchant 's assertion was more credible than the documentation I submitted. 
I am requesting that Citi provide : A detailed explanation of the investigation performed. 
Copies of all evidence relied upon in reaching its decision. 
An explanation of why my submitted evidence was rejected. 
Confirmation that Citi independently evaluated the dispute rather than simply accepting the merchant 's statements. 
I believe Citi 's responses fail to demonstrate that a reasonable investigation was conducted as required under applicable consumer protection laws. 
I respectfully request CFPB review Citi 's handling of this dispute and require a substantive response addressing the evidence submitted.
